title: quercus glauca var. longinux
intro: Quercus glauca var. longinux, also known as the Japanese evergreen oak or long-leaved Japanese evergreen oak, is a variety of deciduous tree native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus glauca var. longinux include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
